summary: Sprint 101 Testing - Social Live & Conditions Explorer features. All backend APIs passing (7/7). Frontend features verified: Conditions tab with Waves icon, Region filter dropdown, Empty state message, Go Live button (red), Story ring system (RED/BLUE/CLEAR).
critical_code_review_comments: Conditions tab VERIFIED: Line 202 in Explore.js - { id: 'conditions', label: 'Conditions', icon: Waves }
Region filter VERIFIED: Lines 481-512 in Explore.js - dropdown with 16 regions from API
Empty state VERIFIED: Lines 519-525 in Explore.js - 'No conditions reports yet' message
Go Live button VERIFIED: Lines 283-297 in Stories.js - red gradient button with Radio icon, data-testid='go-live-btn'
Story ring system VERIFIED: Lines 15-33 in Stories.js - LIVE_RING (RED), NEW_RING (BLUE), VIEWED_RING (CLEAR)
Story sorting VERIFIED: Lines 155-165 in Stories.js - Live broadcasts (RED) sorted to front, then unviewed (BLUE), then viewed (CLEAR)
Condition Reports API VERIFIED: /api/condition-reports/feed returns proper structure with reports, total, has_more
Social Live API VERIFIED: /api/social-live/active returns empty array when no live streams
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 101 features fully verified: 1) Conditions Explorer tab in Explore page with Waves icon (line 202), 2) Region filter dropdown with 16 regions from API, 3) Empty state shows 'No conditions reports yet', 4) Go Live button (red) in Stories bar with Radio icon (lines 283-297), 5) Story ring system: RED=Live, BLUE=New, CLEAR=Viewed (lines 15-33), 6) Stories sorted by live status (lines 155-165). Backend APIs all working: /api/condition-reports/feed, /api/condition-reports/regions (16 regions), /api/social-live/active.

features_verified.conditions_tab_in_explore: VERIFIED - Line 202: { id: 'conditions', label: 'Conditions', icon: Waves }
features_verified.conditions_tab_waves_icon: VERIFIED - Waves icon imported from lucide-react (line 3)
features_verified.region_filter_dropdown: VERIFIED - Lines 481-512: dropdown with regions from API
features_verified.empty_state_message: VERIFIED - Lines 519-525: 'No conditions reports yet' with 'Check back when photographers go live!'
features_verified.go_live_button_position: VERIFIED - Next to Your Story button in Stories bar
features_verified.story_ring_red_live: VERIFIED - Line 15: LIVE_RING = 'bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 via-red-600 to-red-500 animate-pulse'
features_verified.story_ring_blue_new: VERIFIED - Line 17: NEW_RING = 'bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 via-blue-500 to-cyan-400'
features_verified.story_sorting_live_first: VERIFIED - Lines 155-165: Live broadcasts sorted to front
features_verified.condition_reports_feed_api: VERIFIED - Returns {reports: [], total: number, has_more: boolean}

mocked_apis_list: Mux Live Streaming (stream_url, rtmp_url, stream_key return null until Mux credentials added)

ui_testing_notes: All UI features verified via Playwright automation. Login successful, Explore page Conditions tab working, Stories bar with Go Live button visible. Screenshots captured for verification.
